---
title: "Home"
---

# Zeyu Fang

Master of Business Analytics student at UC San Diego with interests in marketing analytics, experimentation, market research, and data-driven decision making.

## Education

- **University of California San Diego** — Master in Business Analytics, expected Nov. 2026
- **Shanghai Jiao Tong University** — Bachelor of Economics in Finance, Minor in Business Data Science

## Experience

- **KPMG** — Insurance Advisory Intern
- **CITIC Securities** — Business Analysis Intern
- **Guotai Junan Asset Management** — Real Estate Investment Group Intern
- **Soochow Securities** — Industry Research Intern

## Focus Areas

- Marketing analytics
- A/B testing and experimentation
- Statistical inference
- Data analysis and visualization
- Market and industry research

## This Site

Use the navigation bar above to learn more about my background, view my resume, and read my coursework and posts.
